case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ACCOCIATES, LLC VS. MCALEVEY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-02-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ACCOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MCALEVEY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-14-2014
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-02-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE MCALEVEY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ACCOCIATES, LLC
AFFIDAVIT OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ACCOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF REDUCED FILING FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ACCOCIATES, LLC
